problem: How to achieve biological nitrogen fixation in non-legume crops to eliminate fertilizer?
hypothesis: Enzymatic depolymerization of specific polymer may resolve How to achieve biological nitrogen fixation in non-legume crops to eliminate fertilizer? by activating at the systems level.

experiment.protocol: Mesocosm controlled study with 5 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: We cannot solve problems with the same thinking that created them. — Einstein paraphrase
